name: The Financial Paramedic
description_short: The Financial Paramedic is a credit repair provider based in Decatur, Georgia. Rated 5.0/5 with 142 Google reviews, reflecting exceptional customer satisfaction.
description_long:
The Financial Paramedic is a Decatur, Georgia-based financial services firm whose name signals its core positioning: emergency-response help for people in financial distress. Operating across credit counseling, financial planning, and tax services, the firm appears to serve clients who need more than one problem solved at once — a common situation for households dealing with damaged credit, back taxes, and disorganized finances simultaneously. The business has built a notable local reputation, with 142 Google reviews averaging a perfect 5.0 rating as of 2026.

The firm's service mix is broader than a typical credit repair shop. Beyond disputing negative items on credit reports, The Financial Paramedic reportedly combines credit counseling with financial planning and both tax preparation and tax consulting. This positions them closer to a holistic financial recovery practice than a narrow credit dispute service. For clients whose credit problems are entangled with tax debt or poor budgeting habits, having these disciplines under one roof can reduce the coordination overhead of working with multiple providers. Their branding also suggests they work with clients in acute financial situations rather than those simply looking to nudge a good score higher.

Consumers should do their due diligence before engaging any credit counseling or repair firm. It is worth confirming whether The Financial Paramedic is affiliated with a recognized accreditation body such as the NFCC or FCAA, and understanding exactly which services are included in any quoted fee — credit counseling, dispute processing, and financial planning are often priced separately. Clients with tax issues should also clarify whether their tax work is handled by a licensed CPA or enrolled agent. Because the firm operates locally out of Decatur, GA, prospective clients outside the Atlanta metro area should confirm whether services are available remotely.

The Financial Paramedic's near-perfect rating across a meaningful sample of 142 reviews is a genuine signal of client satisfaction that is difficult to fake at that volume — it suggests consistently positive outcomes or at minimum a strong client experience. The multi-disciplinary model is a real differentiator for consumers with layered financial problems. That said, the combination of credit repair, financial planning, and tax services in a small local practice warrants scrutiny: depth of expertise varies when one firm covers this much ground, and fees and timelines for credit improvement work should be confirmed in writing before signing any agreement.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Perfect 5.0 Google rating across 142 reviews — unusually high volume for a local firm, suggesting consistent client satisfaction
Covers credit counseling, financial planning, and tax services under one roof, reducing the need to coordinate multiple providers
Based in Decatur, GA — offers in-person access for Atlanta-area clients who prefer face-to-face financial guidance
Name and positioning suggest experience with clients in acute financial distress, not just minor credit tune-ups
Multi-service model means advisors can address interconnected problems (e.g., tax debt affecting credit) holistically
cons: Pricing and fee structures are not publicly listed — consumers must contact the firm directly and should get all costs in writing before committing
Accreditation status and professional licensing (CPA, enrolled agent, NFCC membership) are not immediately verifiable from public sources and should be confirmed directly
A single local practice covering credit, financial planning, and tax services may have uneven depth across disciplines — ask specifically about credentials for each service type
Limited geographic footprint — primarily serves the Atlanta metro; remote service availability for out-of-state clients is unconfirmed
Credit repair timelines are inherently unpredictable; prospective clients should be cautious of any firm that promises specific score improvements within a defined window
best_for: Consumers in Decatur, Georgia looking for credit repair services
People who prefer working with a local credit repair provider
Individuals with negative items on their credit reports
People preparing for major purchases like home or car buying
diagnosis: The Financial Paramedic is best suited for Atlanta-area consumers dealing with overlapping financial problems — damaged credit, disorganized finances, and tax issues — who want a single local advisor rather than juggling multiple specialists. The main caveat is that prospective clients should verify professional credentials and get a clear, written breakdown of fees and expected timelines before signing any service agreement.
services: Credit report dispute and error correction
Credit counseling and credit score improvement strategy
Tax preparation (individual and possibly small business)
Tax consulting and tax liability strategy
Back-tax resolution and IRS negotiation support
Secured credit and credit-building product guidance
Financial recovery planning for clients post-bankruptcy or post-default
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 5036 Snapfinger Woods Dr Ste 109, Decatur, GA 30035
